key_items: Bitcoin price crashed below $62K-$65K range with $600M in longs liquidated, testing support levels not seen since February
Mt. Gox moving $739M in BTC and legendary chartist Peter Brandt warning of potential 'terminal wash-out' with no bottom until October
Momentum rotating away from Bitcoin into AI/IPO tokens (Worldcoin, other alts) while macro uncertainty and regulatory headwinds persist
reasoning: Multiple technical breakdown signals combined with large whale movements (Mt. Gox liquidations) and negative sentiment from respected analysts indicate sustained downside pressure over the next 1-7 days. The $600M liquidation cascade and loss of key support levels suggest short-term relief bounces toward $70K will face heavy selling, keeping BTC trapped in a bearish structural setup.
risks: If Mt. Gox continues dumping BTC or if key support breaks below $62K, capitulation selling could accelerate toward $55K-$58K range, violating multiple months of recovery gains and triggering panic liquidations.
